isi.lyrics:
Lyric UNXL - Waving

Romanization

tteonaneungga geudae
gyeolmareul jitgo maneungga geudae
neok eopsi barabwa geudael
heuryeojyeoganeun geudae

bujeongui neupe
nareul bonaeneun yubae
bichamhan mosuni gadeukhae
jageun mideume chwihae

natanaji anneun haeire
nal tteomireonae
jipchagi uimireul eotge
kkok uimireul eotge

hollo namgyeojil naeire
gaji aneullae
majimageul neoro chaeuge
But only thing I can do is waving
and only thing I can do is waiting

Way out
godokhameul jamjaewo jul
Way out
beoryeojin giyageul jikyeojul
Way out
geudaeya

Oh Way out
jamgin du bareul kkeonaeeo jul
Way out
bicheul ireun nal guwonhae jul
Way out
(I know there’s)
No way out

natanaji anneun haeire
nal tteomireonae
jipchagi uimireul eotge
kkok uimireul eotge

hollo namgyeojil naeire
gaji aneullae
majimageul neoro chaeuge
Only thing I can do is waving
and only thing I can do is waiting

Stay by my side
Please make the time goes by
When you say goodbye
It totally tear up my heart

Stay by my side
Please make the time goes by
When you say goodbye
It totally tear up my heart

Hangeul

떠나는가 그대
결말을 짓고 마는가 그대
넋 없이 바라봐 그댈
흐려져가는 그대

부정의 늪에
나를 보내는 유배
비참한 모순이 가득해
작은 믿음에 취해

나타나지 않는 해일에
날 떠밀어내
집착이 의미를 얻게
꼭 의미를 얻게

홀로 남겨질 내일에
가지 않을래
마지막을 너로 채우게
But only thing I can do is waving
and only thing I can do is waiting

Way out
고독함을 잠재워 줄
Way out
버려진 기약을 지켜줄
Way out
그대야

Oh Way out
잠긴 두 발을 꺼내어 줄
Way out
빛을 잃은 날 구원해 줄
Way out
(I know there’s)
No way out

나타나지 않는 해일에
날 떠밀어내
집착이 의미를 얻게
꼭 의미를 얻게

홀로 남겨질 내일에
가지 않을래
마지막을 너로 채우게
Only thing I can do is waving
and only thing I can do is waiting

Stay by my side
Please make the time goes by
When you say goodbye
It totally tear up my heart

Stay by my side
Please make the time goes by
When you say goodbye
It totally tear up my heart

isi.lyrics:
Lyric UNXL - Be With You

Romanization

sumaneun sigan jina modeun ge jugeodo
I’m gonna be with you
Gonna be with you

dulmanui sesang neomeo eodireul gandaedo
I’m gonna be with you
Gonna be with you

dareun geon siljana
neo animyeon modu da
ne pum aneseo salgo sipeo

saramdeureun wae geureolkka
neowaneun wae dareulkka
haru jongil bwado geuriwo

sumaneun sigan jina modeun ge jugeodo
I’m gonna be with you
Gonna be with you

dulmanui sesang neomeo eodireul gandaedo
I’m gonna be with you
Gonna be with you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric UNXL - Blue Plague

Romanization

“It was tough day”
eoseo wa geudae
oneuldo mani himdeureo boine

“I don’t wanna say”
mutji aneulge
geujeo mareopsi yeope isseojulge

“Can’t understand why all the people out there so mean”
“I Don’t know why I fail at every little thing I do”
gwaenchana jalmothan geo eopseunikka
saenggageul meomchwoboja geuman

yeogijeogiseo millyeogandaedo
eonjena dwie naega isseunikka museowohaji ma

han gaedo akkapjiga ana
nae maeumeun geudaeege isseunikka
naega apahaejulge daesin

“Can’t understand why all the people out there so mean”
“I Don’t know why I fail at every little thing I do”
gwaenchana jalmothan geo eopseunikka
saenggageul meomchwoboja geuman

yeogijeogiseo millyeogandaedo
eonjena dwie naega isseunikka museowohaji ma

han gaedo akkapjiga ana
nae maeumeun geudaeege isseunikka
naega apahaejulge daesin

Hangeul

“It was tough day”
어서 와 그대
오늘도 많이 힘들어 보이네

“I don’t wanna say”
묻지 않을게
그저 말없이 옆에 있어줄게

“Can’t understand why all the people out there so mean”
“I Don’t know why I fail at every little thing I do”
괜찮아 잘못한 거 없으니까
생각을 멈춰보자 그만

여기저기서 밀려간대도
언제나 뒤에 내가 있으니까 무서워하지 마

한 개도 아깝지가 않아
내 마음은 그대에게 있으니까
내가 아파해줄게 대신

“Can’t understand why all the people out there so mean”
“I Don’t know why I fail at every little thing I do”
괜찮아 잘못한 거 없으니까
생각을 멈춰보자 그만

여기저기서 밀려간대도
언제나 뒤에 내가 있으니까 무서워하지 마

한 개도 아깝지가 않아
내 마음은 그대에게 있으니까
내가 아파해줄게 대신

isi.lyrics:
Lyric UNXL - Persona

Romanization

Free will
idaeum where should I move
gajang keodaran gachireul bogil wonhae

Socializing
bitnaneun geotdeulppun
dadeul geodaehan mueonggareul gidarineundeuthae

What are we waiting?
neol daesinhae jul geon
ojik neoppuniraneun geol

It’s not like a movie
bulssuk geobi nandaedu
onjeonhi boyeojugil
The way of the truth
baro i neukkim We make it
jamsi deonjyeodun Persona
nal gaebonghalge
isseo nae gyeote

B-side
sikkeomeon moseupdeul
jeonhyeo dareudago hal su itgina hae

Everybody, Don-don-don’t you know it?
dadeul namani deo-deo-deo jungyohae
geuraedo neol wonhae
No matter what you want

What are we waiting?
neol daesinhae jul geon
ojik neoppuniraneun geol

It’s not like a movie
bulssuk geobi nandaedu
onjeonhi boyeojugil
The way of the truth
baro i neukkim We make it
jamsi deonjyeodun Persona
nal gaebonghalge
isseo nae gyeote

It’s not like a movie
bulssuk geobi nandaedu
onjeonhi boyeojugil
The way of the truth
baro i neukkim We make it
jamsi deonjyeodun Persona
nal gaebonghalge
isseo nae gyeote

jamsi deonjyeodun Persona
isseo nae gyeote


Hangeul

Free will
이다음 where should I move
가장 커다란 가치를 보길 원해

Socializing
빛나는 것들뿐
다들 거대한 무언가를 기다리는듯해

What are we waiting?
널 대신해 줄 건
오직 너뿐이라는 걸

It’s not like a movie
불쑥 겁이 난대두
온전히 보여주길
The way of the truth
바로 이 느낌 We make it
잠시 던져둔 Persona
날 개봉할게
있어 내 곁에

B-side
시꺼먼 모습들
전혀 다르다고 할 수 있기나 해

Everybody, Don-don-don’t you know it?
다들 나만이 더-더-더 중요해
그래도 널 원해
No matter what you want

What are we waiting?
널 대신해 줄 건
오직 너뿐이라는 걸

It’s not like a movie
불쑥 겁이 난대두
온전히 보여주길

있어 내 곁에
